title: Recordation of evidence adduced at trial
doc_html:
§364.  Recordation of evidence adduced at trial

The evidence adduced upon the trial referred to in R.S. 44:363 shall be reduced to writing and shall be recorded, together with the pleadings and judgment of the court, in the judicial records and in the conveyance records of the parish.
doc_text:
§364.  Recordation of evidence adduced at trial
The evidence adduced upon the trial referred to in R.S. 44:363 shall be reduced to writing and shall be recorded, together with the pleadings and judgment of the court, in the judicial records and in the conveyance records of the parish.
